tags.name: Unincorporated Chatsworth
tags.note: Unincorporated Chatsworth is part of Los Angeles County, but it is separate from the neighborhood of Chatsworth in the city of Los Angeles.  Also known as Chatsworth or Santa Susana Mountains

This is the county line and it does go into the ROW of I-605. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/LB0168.pdf . Annexation is still on file with CA Secretary of State as well.
This is the surveryed boundary. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/LKWD0031.pdf . Documents are in the public domain per County of Santa Clara v. CFAC
This is the surveryed boundary. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/LKWD0023.pdf . Documents are in the public domain per County of Santa Clara v. CFAC
This is the surveryed boundary. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/CERR0001.pdf. Documents are in the public domain per County of Santa Clara v. CFAC
This is the surveryed boundary. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/LB0185.pdf . Documents are in the public domain per County of Santa Clara v. CFAC
This is the surveryed boundary. See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/HG0001.pdf . Documents are in the public domain per County of Santa Clara v. CFAC

This is the county line per California Secretary of State, Los Angeles County Recorder, and the Los Angeles County Local Agency Formation Commission (LA County LAFCO). See https://pwgis.blob.core.windows.net/smpm/SMPM_AnnexationCity/LB0244.pdf .
